# opnsense_trafficshaper_pipe (Data Source)

Reads a traffic shaper pipe on OPNsense by its UUID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `bandwidth` (Number) Bandwidth value.
- `bandwidth_metric` (String) Bandwidth unit: bit, Kbit, Mbit, Gbit.
- `description` (String) Description (required by OPNsense).
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this pipe is enabled.
- `mask` (String) Dynamic pipe mask: none, src-ip, dst-ip.
- `number` (Number) Pipe number (auto-assigned by OPNsense).
- `scheduler` (String) Scheduler type (e.g. fq_codel).
